headline: Institutional Investor Interest Growing In TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG)
summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds, with 87 hedge funds holding a stake in the company at the end of the first quarter of 2026. This is up from 79 in Q4 2025, reflecting growing institutional investor interest. On June 2, UBS […]
